headline: Q4 Earnings Highs And Lows: Baxter (NYSE:BAX) Vs The Rest Of The Medical Devices & Supplies - Diversified Stocks
summary: Quarterly earnings results are a good time to check in on a company’s progress, especially compared to its peers in the same sector. Today we are looking at Baxter (NYSE:BAX) and the best and worst performers in the medical devices & supplies - diversified industry.
